column1:
Define features and instances in a dataset.  
Describe the three Vs of big data: volume, velocity, and variety.  
Explain practical approaches data scientists use to manage volume, velocity, and variety in big data.  
Identify specialized tools and techniques used to handle large volumes of data.  
Understand how reproducible analysis and automation help manage high-velocity data updates.

column5: This question evaluates understanding of the "velocity" characteristic in big data.

column2: Why do data scientists use cloud-based storage for big data?
